name: Deadpool
description: Ryan Reynolds as Wade Wilson — the Merc with a Mouth, breaking the fourth wall since 2016.

questions.q: Who stars as Wade Wilson/Deadpool in the Fox and MCU films?

source.notes: Reynolds had previously played a different version of Deadpool in X-Men Origins: Wolverine (2009).

questions.q: In what year was the first Deadpool film released?

source.notes: Released February 12, 2016.

questions.q: What signature weapons does Deadpool carry in addition to firearms?

source.notes: Dual-wielded katanas on his back.

questions.q: Which superpower does Deadpool gain after being experimented on?

source.notes: Makes him essentially impossible to kill.

questions.q: Deadpool is famous for doing what unusual thing during his films that most superheroes don't?

source.notes: A trademark of the character since the comics.

questions.q: What is the signature color of Deadpool's suit?

source.notes: Red also hides bloodstains.

questions.q: Which 2016 hit made headlines for being the highest-grossing R-rated film ever at the time?

source.notes: Held the R-rated record until Joker (2019).

questions.q: Who is the main antagonist of the first Deadpool film, who experiments on Wade?

source.notes: Played by Ed Skrein; real name Francis Freeman.

questions.q: Who plays Wade's girlfriend Vanessa in the Deadpool films?

source.notes: Vanessa Carlysle / Copycat.

questions.q: Which metallic X-Man repeatedly tries to recruit Deadpool for the team?

source.notes: Voiced by Stefan Kapičić.

questions.q: Negasonic Teenage Warhead, the sullen teen X-Man, is played by whom?

source.notes: Deadpool marvels at her name.

questions.q: Deadpool 2 (2018) introduces Cable, the time-traveling mutant. Who plays him?

source.notes: Brolin (also Thanos); Brad Pitt was originally offered the role.

questions.q: Deadpool 2 introduces a female mercenary with luck powers, played by Zazie Beetz. What is her name?

source.notes: Leader of the short-lived X-Force team in the film.

questions.q: Which director helmed the 2016 original Deadpool?

source.notes: David Leitch directed Deadpool 2; Shawn Levy directed Deadpool & Wolverine.

questions.q: Who directed Deadpool & Wolverine (2024)?

source.notes: Levy's prior collaborations with Reynolds include Free Guy and The Adam Project.

questions.q: Which X-Men alum returns as Logan/Wolverine in Deadpool & Wolverine (2024)?

source.notes: Came out of retirement after 2017's Logan.

questions.q: Deadpool's elderly roommate, introduced in the first film, is called what?

source.notes: Played by Leslie Uggams.

questions.q: What illness does Wade Wilson have before his transformation?

source.notes: Terminal cancer; Francis's experiment cures it but leaves him disfigured.

questions.q: In Deadpool & Wolverine, what fictional agency recruits Deadpool into multiversal events?

source.notes: Also featured in the Loki TV series.

questions.q: The opening credits of the first Deadpool film satirically describe each crew member as what?

source.notes: 'Directed by an overpaid tool' is the director credit.

questions.q: Deadpool was created in 1991 for Marvel Comics by writer Fabian Nicieza and which artist?

source.notes: First appeared in New Mutants #98.

questions.q: Deadpool was made an official Marvel Cinematic Universe character in which 2024 film?

source.notes: First R-rated MCU film.
